title: Recognition of UK professional qualifications in EU member states
body: "This guide will help you navigate the different sources of information on the recognition of professional qualifications in the EU.  It also helps you understand:   when recognition of professional qualifications is required in an EU member state where to find details around EU member state regulatory processes for your profession where preferential routes to recognition may be available for UK professionals what useful additional steps can be undertaken to help get your qualifications recognised   For more information, see:   information on selling services to EU, Switzerland, Norway, Iceland and Liechtenstein   Article 158 and Annex 24 of the UK-EU TCA which includes a provision enabling profession-specific recognition agreements guidance for regulators and professional bodies on entering into recognition arrangements with counterparts    "
